privileged_info_summary: The task implements Picture-in-Picture (PiP) mode for an Android application. The project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/StreamFlix. The agent must modify two files: (1) app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml to add android:supportsPictureInPicture='true' and android:configChanges='screenSize|smallestScreenSize|screenLayout|orientation' to PlayerActivity, and (2) app/src/main/java/com/example/streamflix/PlayerActivity.kt to override onUserLeaveHint() (calling enterPictureInPictureMode with 16:9 aspect ratio) and onPictureInPictureModeChanged() (toggling closeButton visibility). The project must build successfully to pass verification (score ≥ 75 points).
